question: Modify the `Book` class to include a destructor. The destructor should print a message indicating the title of the book object that is being destroyed.

test_cases.expected:
--- Starting Correct Version Test ---
Book 'The Lord of the Rings' (ID: 201) constructed.
Book 'The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy' (ID: 202) constructed.
Inside block scope.
Book 'The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy' (ID: 202) is being destroyed.
Book 'Dune' (ID: 203) constructed.
Dynamically allocated book created.
Book 'Dune' (ID: 203) is being destroyed.
Book 'Foundation' (ID: 204) constructed.
Book 'I, Robot' (ID: 205) constructed.
Vector populated.
--- Correct Version Test Ended ---
Book 'I, Robot' (ID: 205) is being destroyed.
Book 'Foundation' (ID: 204) is being destroyed.
Book 'The Lord of the Rings' (ID: 201) is being destroyed.
